title: Pseudolycopodiella sarcocaulos
taxonomy: Pseudolycopodiella sarcocaulos is classified within the family Lycopodiaceae, commonly known as the club moss family. This family belongs to the division Lycopodiophyta, which consists of ancient, vascular plants. The division Lycopodiophyta is further grouped into the kingdom Plantae, indicating its classification as a plant. Within the family Lycopodiaceae, Pseudolycopodiella sarcocaulos is categorized under the genus Pseudolycopodiella. The genus Pseudolycopodiella is characterized by its unique morphological features and is primarily found in tropical regions.
uses: Pseudolycopodiella sarcocaulos is a type of lycopodiaceous plant, but information on its specific medicinal uses is limited or not well-documented.
